get.description: List Quran references linked to a public kitab. Defaults to approved references.
Get one ayah by canonical ayah key. When include_audio=true and recitation_id is omitted, the backend uses the default public recitation.

parameters.description: Include audio track and timestamp segments
parameters.name: include_audio

parameters.description: Recitation ID. Defaults to the public default recitation when include_audio=true.
parameters.name: recitation_id

get.description: List imported recitation resources and audio coverage. Exactly one full-public recitation may be marked is_default.
Search Arabic Quran text and the selected Indonesian translation.
List Quran surahs in mushaf order. Surah info is omitted by default; pass include_info=true for language-specific info HTML.
Get one Quran surah with language-specific info.
List all ayahs or an ayah range for one surah. When include_audio=true and recitation_id is omitted, the backend uses the default public recitation.
get.summary: List Quran ayahs for a surah

parameters.description: Include audio track and timestamp segments
parameters.name: include_audio

parameters.description: Recitation ID. Defaults to the public default recitation when include_audio=true.
parameters.name: recitation_id

get.description: List tasks for the current user with optional filtering

post.description: Create a new task for the current user

patch.description: Change task status (todo -> in_progress -> done, or in_progress -> todo)
